prompt: A close-up upper-body portrait of a cute Japanese idol-style girl in an ultra-kawaii pastel bedroom, centered in frame, with her face hidden by a large solid rectangular censor block in a muted mauve-brown color. She has dark brown medium-length wavy hair in twin tails, decorated with 2 oversized translucent pink bows, pearl strands, ribbon streamers, and 2 dangling star charms. Her outfit is an extravagant yume-kawaii idol dress in shimmering pink and lavender, with glossy satin fabric, lace trim, frilly off-shoulder sleeves, sheer ruffles, beadwork, tiny gem details, and a large jeweled heart brooch at the center of the chest. Include a lace camisole neckline underneath, a sparkly collar with tiny pastel charms, a ribbon bow near one curl that she gently holds with one hand, and matching frilled wrist cuffs. The background is a dreamy, heavily decorated kawaii room filled with soft fairy lights, pastel curtains, ribbons, bows, plush textures, and glowing decor. On the left side, add a pink neon heart sign with a bow outline containing the Japanese text 夢は叶えるもの. Use a soft-focus lens, glittery highlights, pearlescent textures, warm pink-purple ambient lighting, bokeh sparkles, and a vertical social-media photo composition. The overall mood is sweet, magical, idol-core, feminine, and hyper-detailed, like a pastel fashion photo taken in a decorated kawaii studio.
